src/errors.ts.summary: Defines the NonExhaustiveError thrown when .exhaustive() is called but no pattern matched the input.
src/errors.ts.inputs: Extends the built-in Error class; takes the unmatched input value.
src/errors.ts.outputs: Exports the NonExhaustiveError class, exposing the offending input and a formatted message.
src/errors.ts.should: Serialize the input (via JSON.stringify, falling back to the raw value) into a descriptive error message.
src/errors.ts.shouldNot: Not perform pattern matching, IO, or import from other project modules; not swallow the serialization failure silently beyond the fallback.

src/index.ts.summary: Public entry point re-exporting the library's runtime API (match, isMatching, the P/Pattern namespace, NonExhaustiveError).
src/index.ts.outputs: Named exports: match, isMatching, Pattern, P (alias), NonExhaustiveError.
src/index.ts.should: Aggregate and surface the intended public surface only.
src/index.ts.shouldNot: Not contain logic, types, or internal helpers; not export internals (symbols, helpers); other modules must not import from it.

src/internals/helpers.ts.summary: Runtime pattern-matching engine: recursively tests whether a value matches a pattern and collects selections.
src/internals/helpers.ts.inputs: Consumes internal symbols and Pattern/Matcher type definitions; operates on arbitrary pattern and value pairs plus a select callback.
src/internals/helpers.ts.should: Handle matcher objects, tuple/variadic/object patterns, key presence, optional keys, and value equality; recurse into subpatterns; drive selections via the callback.
src/internals/helpers.ts.shouldNot: Not import from the public entry point (index); not depend on match.ts or patterns.ts runtime; internal only, not part of the public API.

src/internals/symbols.ts.summary: Declares the internal Symbol keys and one string key used to tag and discriminate matcher/select/variadic patterns.
src/internals/symbols.ts.outputs: matcher, unset, isVariadic, anonymousSelectKey, override — each as a value and a type alias.
src/internals/symbols.ts.should: Provide stable, collision-free keys visible to tsc for inference.
src/internals/symbols.ts.shouldNot: Not contain logic or import other modules; users should not import these directly.

src/is-matching.ts.summary: Implements isMatching: a curried/direct type-guard that checks whether a value matches a pattern.
src/is-matching.ts.inputs: Imports matchPattern from internals, the P namespace, and Pattern/helper types; takes a pattern and optionally a value.
src/is-matching.ts.outputs: isMatching overloaded function returning either a type-guard predicate or a boolean.
src/is-matching.ts.should: Delegate matching to matchPattern; support the 1-arg (guard factory) and 2-arg (direct check) forms; throw on wrong arity.
src/is-matching.ts.shouldNot: Not reimplement matching logic; not import from the public entry point (index); not mutate inputs.

src/match.ts.summary: Implements match(): a chainable builder (MatchExpression) evaluating patterns against an input and running handlers.
src/match.ts.inputs: Imports matchPattern, symbols, NonExhaustiveError, and Pattern/Match types; operates on the input value and registered clauses.
src/match.ts.outputs: match function returning a Match expression; internal MatchExpression class with with/when/otherwise/exhaustive/run/returnType/narrow.
src/match.ts.should: Track matched state immutably, evaluate patterns/guards, collect selections, invoke handlers, and throw NonExhaustiveError by default when unmatched.
src/match.ts.shouldNot: Not reimplement low-level matching (delegates to matchPattern); not import from the public entry point; not expose internal builder types publicly.

src/patterns.ts.summary: The P module: constructs all runtime patterns (wildcards, primitives, combinators, guards, selectors) and their chainable APIs.
src/patterns.ts.inputs: Imports internals (matchPattern, getSelectionKeys, flatMap, symbols), isMatching, and Pattern/type definitions.
src/patterns.ts.outputs: Pattern builders (array, set, map, record, intersection, union, not, when, select, optional, instanceOf, shape), wildcards (any, _, string, number, bigint, boolean, symbol, nullish, nonNullable), and type re-exports (Pattern, infer, narrow).
src/patterns.ts.should: Build Matcher objects implementing the matcher protocol and wrap them in chainable/variadic helpers for method chaining.
src/patterns.ts.shouldNot: Not import from the public entry point (index); not implement the recursive match traversal itself (delegates to matchPattern).

src/types/index.ts.summary: Type barrel re-exporting everything from Pattern.
src/types/index.ts.should: Aggregate the Pattern type surface only.
src/types/index.ts.shouldNot: Not contain type logic or runtime code; not re-export unrelated internal type modules.

src/types/helpers.ts.summary: Foundational type-level utility library (unions, tuples, literals, object/array predicates, HKT Fn) used across the type system.
src/types/helpers.ts.outputs: Many utility types: ValueOf, UnionToIntersection, UnionToTuple, Equal, IsAny, IsLiteral, IsPlainObject, Compute, Fn, Call, and more.
src/types/helpers.ts.should: Provide reusable generic type primitives with no dependencies.
src/types/helpers.ts.shouldNot: Not import from other project modules (leaf of the type graph); contain no runtime values.

src/types/Pattern.ts.summary: Core pattern type definitions: the Matcher protocol, per-combinator matcher aliases, Pattern<a>, and the Chainable method interfaces.
src/types/Pattern.ts.inputs: Imports symbols, helper types, FindSelected selection types, matcher (from patterns), and ExtractPreciseValue.
src/types/Pattern.ts.outputs: Matcher, MatcherType, MatchResult, ArrayP/RecordP/OptionalP/etc., Pattern, UnknownValuePattern, and Chainable/StringChainable/NumberChainable/BigIntChainable/ArrayChainable interfaces.
src/types/Pattern.ts.should: Model the shape of every pattern and the fluent chaining API at the type level.
src/types/Pattern.ts.shouldNot: Not contain runtime code; not import from the public entry point; type-only module.

src/types/Match.ts.summary: Public type definition of the match() builder, threading handled cases and inferred output through .with/.when/.exhaustive/etc.
src/types/Match.ts.inputs: Imports symbols, Pattern/MatchedValue, InvertPattern(ForExclude), DeepExclude, FindSelected, and helper types.
src/types/Match.ts.outputs: Match type and its overloaded method signatures; Exhaustive helper type; NonExhaustiveError/TSPatternError marker interfaces.
src/types/Match.ts.should: Compute narrowed selections, exclude handled cases from the input union, and enforce exhaustiveness at the type level.
src/types/Match.ts.shouldNot: Not contain runtime logic; not import from the public entry point; type-only module.

src/types/BuildMany.ts.summary: Type utility that rebuilds a data structure by setting values at given deep paths (used to reconstruct distributed unions).
src/types/BuildMany.ts.inputs: Imports Iterator, IsOptionalKeysOf, UpdateAt, ValueOf from helpers; takes a data type and [value, path] pairs.
src/types/BuildMany.ts.should: Recursively descend arrays/tuples/Set/Map/objects and set the value at each path, preserving optional-key modifiers.
src/types/BuildMany.ts.shouldNot: Not contain runtime code; not import from the public entry point; type-only.

src/types/DeepExclude.ts.summary: Thin type wrapper computing the deep exclusion of pattern b from type a via union distribution.
src/types/DeepExclude.ts.inputs: Imports DistributeMatchingUnions; takes types a and b.
src/types/DeepExclude.ts.should: Distribute matching unions in a and Exclude b from the result.
src/types/DeepExclude.ts.shouldNot: Not contain runtime code; not reimplement distribution (delegates to DistributeUnions); type-only.

src/types/DistributeUnions.ts.summary: Type engine that expands unions inside a data structure into the union of all concrete combinations matching a pattern.
src/types/DistributeUnions.ts.inputs: Imports BuildMany, IsMatching, and many helper types; takes a data type a and pattern p.
src/types/DistributeUnions.ts.should: Locate matching unions (bounded to 5 levels), produce [value, path] combination lists, and rebuild via BuildMany.
src/types/DistributeUnions.ts.shouldNot: Not contain runtime code; not import from the public entry point; type-only.

src/types/ExtractPreciseValue.ts.summary: Type utility narrowing a value type a to the most precise subtype implied by an inverted pattern b.
src/types/ExtractPreciseValue.ts.inputs: Imports Override plus helper types; takes value type a and inverted-pattern type b.
src/types/ExtractPreciseValue.ts.should: Recurse through arrays/tuples, Map/Set, and plain objects to intersect precise values, honoring Override and non-nullable {} semantics.
src/types/ExtractPreciseValue.ts.shouldNot: Not contain runtime code; not import from the public entry point; type-only.

src/types/FindSelected.ts.summary: Type engine that derives the handler's selection argument type from selects embedded in a pattern.
src/types/FindSelected.ts.inputs: Imports symbols, Matcher/Pattern types, and helper types; takes input i and pattern p.
src/types/FindSelected.ts.outputs: None/Some/SelectionType, FindSelectionUnion, Selections, FindSelected, and select-error types.
src/types/FindSelected.ts.should: Walk matchers/arrays/objects to collect named/anonymous selections and map them to handler arguments, flagging illegal mixed/multiple anonymous selects.
src/types/FindSelected.ts.shouldNot: Not contain runtime code; not import from the public entry point; type-only.

src/types/InvertPattern.ts.summary: Type engine inverting a pattern into the value type it represents, both for inference and for exclusion of handled cases.
src/types/InvertPattern.ts.inputs: Imports DeepExclude, Matcher/Pattern/Override types, and many helpers; takes a pattern p and input i.
src/types/InvertPattern.ts.outputs: InvertPattern, InvertPatternForExclude, and their internal/array/reduce helper types.
src/types/InvertPattern.ts.should: Map each matcher kind to its represented value type, handle arrays/objects/optional keys, and compute exclusion types respecting literal/primitive rules.
src/types/InvertPattern.ts.shouldNot: Not contain runtime code; not import from the public entry point; type-only.

src/types/IsMatching.ts.summary: Type-level predicate deciding whether value type a is matched by (inverted) pattern type b.
src/types/IsMatching.ts.inputs: Imports helper types (Primitives, IsUnion, IsPlainObject, ValueOf, etc.); takes types a and b.
src/types/IsMatching.ts.should: Distribute over unions and compare primitives, tuples/arrays, and plain objects to yield true/false.
src/types/IsMatching.ts.shouldNot: Not contain runtime code; not import from the public entry point; type-only.
